name: What if workers comp denies my claim in Murray Utah?
description: Appeal to Labor Commission within 20 days with better evidence[1].

mainEntity.name: What if workers comp denies my claim in Murray Utah?

acceptedAnswer.text: Appeal to Labor Commission within 20 days with better evidence[1].
acceptedAnswer.description: **Appeal to Utah Labor Commission within 20 days of denial.** Provide more evidence like medical opinions[1]. **Key factors:** Common denials for late report or non-work causation; third-party fault separate. **Practical guidance:** Request denial reasons in writing, gather stronger proof, file appeal timely. Free consult with attorney often. **Many denials overturned with help.**
